recipient_party_id.description: Party id of the proposed thank-you recipient (typically the upstream message sender).

suggested_text.description: Drafted thank-you note body, ready for principal review.

urgency.description: Matches CommitmentProposedV1.urgency's Literal exactly so the pipeline can round-trip without coercion drift.

confidence.description: Extractor-side confidence in the structured fields, separate from the upstream classifier's confidence.
